page_content:
Credit Only Granted for: ENST450, ENST650, or MEES650.

Additional Information: Wading boots (at least hip length) are strongly recommended.

ENST681 Advanced Ecological Design (3 Credits)

An advanced survey course on the field of ecological design. Principles of design are illustrated with case studies from biologically-based waste treatment systems, ecosystem management and sustainable development.

Prerequisite: Must have completed one semester of calculus; and (CHEM131 and PHYS121). Or permission of instructor. Cross-listed with M EES681.
